responses.skills: Suraj is proficient in React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, and various AI/ML technologies. He has extensive experience in full-stack development and is currently exploring Generative AI applications.
responses.experience: Suraj has 5+ years of professional experience as a software engineer, working on scalable web applications, API development, and modern frontend frameworks.
responses.projects: Suraj has worked on various projects including e-commerce platforms, AI-powered applications, and modern web applications using React and Node.js.
responses.contact: You can reach Suraj through the contact form on this website, or connect with him on LinkedIn and GitHub.
responses.default: I'd be happy to help you learn more about Suraj! You can ask me about his skills, experience, projects, or how to get in touch with him.
